name: Black Bean Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until the onion is tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add beans to the skillet. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
4. Cook and stir the mixture over low heat, mashing the beans until it's hot and pulpy.
5. Remove from heat. Spread 1/4 of the bean mixture on each of the four tortillas.
6. Top each tortilla with 2 tablespoons (32 grams) shredded cheese.
7. Arrange the tortillas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 5 minutes, until the cheese melts.
9. To serve, top each tortilla with 1/4 of the Tomatillo guacamole.
10. Roll up the tortillas and serve.
